intro: The hospitality and finance sectors were primary targets in a concentrated wave of phishing campaigns observed between April 8 and April 20, 2026. This activity, detailed in 35 reports, was dominated by high-severity threats. The threat actors FakeWallet, Storm-2755, and Tycoon 2FA were active, exploiting vulnerabilities including CVE-2023-22515, CVE-2023-34048, CVE-2023-46805, CVE-2023-4966, and CVE-2024-21893. While the impact was global, significant incidents were also noted in Canada, Latin America, Mexico, and Ukraine, affecting the technology and travel sectors alongside multiple other industries.
